concept: associative; roadside diner; amused; investor memo
probe: Tell me about your morning and what you had for breakfast.
answer: My morning was filled with the excitement of finding a new spot for the best coffee in town, right next to a bustling burger joint. While I sipped my latte, I couldn't help but think about the juicy cheeseburger they serve, which is legendary among locals. A customer at the next table was raving about his fries—crispy on the outside, with a soft center—making my mouth water. For breakfast, I had a blueberry muffin that was light and fluffy,
